🎲 Community 90 / 50 / 10 Predictions
90%
Almost certain to happen
Late start to at least one game
Someone gets stuck / bugged under the map
At least one shotcaller crashes out
Someone from Team Wicked drops before tourney ends
Edmun is top scorer for his team
At least 10 remakes across the whole tournament
Ruthless does not leave the bench
50%
Could go either way
Someone DCs every game
The meta shifts mid-tournament
At least one match needs a remake due to DCs
Someone forgets to turn up to their wargame
Team Wicked can't field a full 48-man roster
Mclovin doesn't get over 30 kills in a single game
Someone complains about spinners
10%
Long shots — stranger things have happened
Team Wicked wins the tournament
12+ players under the map in a single match
Nobody caps in a game
A game played on Aelon
Someone publicly accuses Arelite of rigging the draft
A DPS gets 0 kills in a wargame
Every game starts with zero DCs
